description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a mix of hardscaped driveway and green lawn. The structure features a flat roof, clean lines, and a predominantly white and gray exterior, with multiple large windows and sliding glass doors. A spacious driveway leads to a garage on one side, while the rear of the house opens to a sizable swimming pool and patio area. The landscaping includes clusters of shrubs and small trees, especially concentrated near the back and side of the property. The building appears to have two main wings, with the living spaces oriented toward the pool and garden. The overall design emphasizes openness, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a white and gray facade, large windows, a driveway, garage, and a backyard pool set amid landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, garage entrance, and the primary facade with large windows and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the landscaped garden, clusters of trees, and the transition from driveway to backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive pool, patio area, and the extensive use of glass for indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage, driveway loop, and the pool area extending from the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
